findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 34 findings from 7 agents into 24 unique findings. Removed 10 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): North Star Metric: Search Relevance Score (score=3.0); Primary KPI: Search Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=2.882); Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search (score=2.88); Feature Flag Dependency for Rollback (score=2.742); Monitor Search Relevance Score (score=2.742)

top_priorities.title: North Star Metric: Search Relevance Score
Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. customer-001 vs feasibility-001: The new ranking algorithm has caused a significant drop in search relevance scores, affecting user satisfaction, which is critical.; feasibility-002 vs feasibility-003: The ability to rollback the v2.4.1 deployment is blocked by a dependent feature flag change, while increased support volume indicates a significant user experience issue.; risk-004 vs feasibility-001: Potential violation of data retention policy may lead to critical privacy risks, while the drop in search relevance scores is also critical.

evidence.excerpt: The new ranking algorithm has caused a significant drop in search relevance scores, affecting user satisfaction, which is critical.
The ability to rollback the v2.4.1 deployment is blocked by a dependent feature flag change, while increased support volume indicates a significant user experience issue.
Potential violation of data retention policy may lead to critical privacy risks, while the drop in search relevance scores is also critical.

conflicts.description: The new ranking algorithm has caused a significant drop in search relevance scores, affecting user satisfaction, which is critical.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize a rollback of the v2.4.1 deployment to restore search relevance scores while addressing the feature flag dependency.
conflicts.reasoning: User satisfaction is paramount; restoring relevance should take precedence over new features until the issue is resolved.

conflicts.description: The ability to rollback the v2.4.1 deployment is blocked by a dependent feature flag change, while increased support volume indicates a significant user experience issue.
conflicts.resolution: Resolve the feature flag dependency urgently to enable rollback and address the support volume issue.
conflicts.reasoning: Quick remediation is necessary to prevent further user dissatisfaction and churn.

conflicts.description: Potential violation of data retention policy may lead to critical privacy risks, while the drop in search relevance scores is also critical.
conflicts.resolution: Implement immediate measures to ensure compliance with data retention policies while addressing the search relevance issue.
conflicts.reasoning: Both privacy compliance and user experience are critical; they must be addressed simultaneously to mitigate risks.

summary: Consolidated 34 findings into 24 unique items. Removed 10 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: North Star Metric: Search Relevance Score.
